jsonLd.title: Evok is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
